title: erigeron undulatus
intro: Erigeron undulatus, also known as the wavyleaf fleabane or cranesbill, is a perennial herb in the daisy family that is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Erigeron undulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Erigeron undulatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in natural remedies for its medicinal properties.
